summary: Verified fluid desktop (697px vs pane 697px), fixed mobile (390px), fixed tablet (820px), desktop restore (697px vs pane 697px), and mobile persistence after reload (390px) with no console errors.
steps: connect over CDP to the existing Chromium target on 127.0.0.1:9222
assert .device-selector defaults to Desktop and compare .app-iframe boundingBox width to .app-pane-viewport width
click Mobile and measure .app-iframe boundingBox width
click Tablet and measure .app-iframe boundingBox width
click Desktop and re-measure fluid iframe width
click Mobile again, reload the page in the same browser context, and verify active state plus restored width
capture console and page errors for the full pass
